insight: `getAliveMonsters()` originally counted ALL aggressive entities in the arena region — not just CoreArena-spawned ones. Non-Tameable pets/summons from third-party plugins block phase advancement. Fix (#596): wave-spawned mobs are now tagged with `CoreArenaSpawned` metadata and only those are counted. Note that `EntityUtil.isAggressive()` already excludes `Tameable` entities, so vanilla tamed pets were never the issue.
